case_title: MARCUS MCGINTY VS. BMT PROMOTIONS AND TALENT LLC

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGINTY, MARCUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BMT PROMOTIONS AND TALENT LLC A GEORGIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA BMT STAFFING SOLUTIONS $2,990.13 PRINCIPAL, $4.76 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,219.89, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
